description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian with a youthful, urban appearance, featuring a sleeveless vest over a striped top and loose, high-waisted pants. The figure has a slim build and stands with arms slightly outstretched, suggesting a neutral or T-pose. The footwear is chunky and exaggerated, adorned with spikes and thick soles, giving a bold, streetwear-inspired look. The individual wears a wristband and a headband, adding to the casual, sporty vibe. The hair is voluminous and textured, styled in thick, shoulder-length locks. The overall design is expressive, with attention to accessories and a modern, energetic fashion sense.
description: A stylized adult in urban streetwear with a sleeveless vest, loose pants, chunky spiked shoes, and voluminous textured hair. Accessories include a headband and wristband, enhancing the modern, sporty look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped top, sleeveless vest, wristband, headband, and the full detail of the chunky, spiked shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the thickness of the hair, and the side silhouette of the outfit and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, pants, and the full volume of the hair, as well as the back details of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and the side of the shoes and pants.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a sleeveless vest, striped top, loose pants, and accessories such as a headband and wristband
